headline: Moto's Tag 2 tracker is $20 for a limited time
summary: Moto Tag 2, a new Bluetooth and UWB tracker, is now available in the US. It offers improved battery life and more accurate tracking. Grab it at a special launch price of $19.99 (originally $29.99).

headline: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
summary: Netflix's new Willy Wonka reality show, 'The Golden Ticket,' premieres September 23rd. The series features an AI-generated voiceover, reportedly mimicking Gene Wilder. It follows the trend of reality shows based on fictional competitions.

headline: Rockstar workers push to unionize ahead of GTA VI’s launch
summary: Workers at Rockstar Games are seeking voluntary recognition for their union, IWGB Game Workers Union. This follows accusations of 'union busting' after over 30 staffers were fired last year. Unionization efforts intensify ahead of the highly anticipated GTA VI launch.

headline: Google's killing off Tenor GIF searches in other apps
summary: Google is shutting down the Tenor API, impacting GIF search functionality in many apps. Platforms like X, Discord, and WhatsApp will need to migrate their GIF integrations. The Tenor website and its GIF library will remain active.

headline: Today's Top Deals: LEGO Polaroid Camera, Pokémon Prismatic Evolutions ETB, Metroid Prime 4, and More
summary: Discover today's best deals on popular items like the LEGO Polaroid Camera. Save big on the Pokémon Prismatic Evolutions Elite Trainer Box. Find discounts on Square Enix games and the Nex Playground console.

headline: Netflix Using AI to Resurrect Gene Wilder's Voice for Willy Wonka Reality Series The Golden Ticket
summary: Netflix is employing AI to recreate Gene Wilder's iconic voice. The AI-generated voice will feature in their new reality show, 'Wonka's The Golden Ticket'. The series is based on the classic Willy Wonka universe.

headline: Microsoft Reportedly Considering Canceling Marvel's Blade and Shutting Arkane Down
summary: Reports suggest Microsoft is considering canceling the anticipated 'Marvel's Blade' game. There are also rumors of potentially shutting down its developer, Arkane. This news raises significant concerns for the studio and the game's future.

headline: Love and Deepspace Cancels New Wolfy Love Interest Valko
summary: Otome game 'Love and Deepspace' has announced the cancellation of a planned new love interest. The 'wolfy' character Valko will no longer be added to the game's roster. Fans will not see Valko as a potential romantic partner.

headline: Starmer trims budgets to fund extra £15bn for defence
summary: Keir Starmer plans to reallocate funds, boosting UK defense spending by an extra £15 billion. The comprehensive plan details future investments in equipping the armed forces. This initiative marks a significant commitment to defense over the coming years.

headline: Will Starmer's plan for defence help UK hit Nato's spending target?
summary: BBC Verify analyzes Keir Starmer's Defence Investment Plan. The review focuses on the UK's military expenditure and its NATO commitments. Questions arise regarding the plan's effectiveness in meeting NATO's spending targets.

headline: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
summary: The US Supreme Court has affirmed birthright citizenship in a landmark decision. This ruling delivers a major setback to Donald Trump's anti-immigration agenda. Civil rights groups have widely praised the court's decision.

headline: Government promises to act on maternity care failings which 'shame our society'
summary: An independent inquiry has revealed widespread 'unacceptable racism and discrimination' in maternity care. These systemic failings are directly impacting patient safety across the UK. The government has pledged to take decisive action to address the issues.
